description: This book contains all the puzzles from two of our popular books combined: Extreme Dot-to-Dot Beautiful Birds & Extreme Dot-to-Dot Ocean Puzzles, for much less than the cost of buying them separately. Enjoy! Relieve your stress with dot to dot books for adults! This extreme dot to dot book will help you unwind at the end of the day. You'll never get bored with the wide range of animals to discover. Guess the animal as the image takes shape! The puzzles range from 365 - 873 dots. Skillfully constructed puzzles Stress Relief: Relax & Enjoy! Variety: Puzzles from 365 - 873 dots See how many you recognize! Puzzles go in order of least to most complicated, so you can choose how complicated of a puzzle you would like to do and improve as you go along. This is more than just a fun and entertaining book. It's also a powerful tool for improving your mindfulness and concentration, helping you to stay focused and centered even in the midst of a busy day. So whether you're a seasoned puzzler or a complete beginner, Mindful Dot-to-Dot is the perfect way to challenge your mind and nurture your creativity. Order your copy today and start connecting the dots! Read more
